pack.cyber_armorer.name: Cyber Armorer
tooltip.cyber_armorer.ajax: §7Come rain or shine, it'll weather it out.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.ajax_moron_labe:
§6ICONIC
§7A weapon for an alpha among alphas.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.carnage_guts:
§6ICONIC
§7Originally belonged to Rebecca from David Martinez's crew.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.copperhead: §7From ALASKA to ZIMBABWE - A versatile weapon for versatile combatansts.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.copperhead_psalm:
§6ICONIC
§7"Let him rain coals on the wicked; fire and sulfur and a scorching wind shall be the portion of their cup."
tooltip.cyber_armorer.g58_dian: §7Most all-time apperance atop the "Guns and Horses" rankings.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.grad: §7From this weapon there is no cover.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.grad_05:
§6ICONIC
§7A modded version of TECHTRONIKA's GRAD sniper rifle.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.grad_overwatch:
§6ICONIC
§7A sniper rifle that belonged to Panam. Increased reload speed.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.grad_sparky:
§6ICONIC
§7Incredibly precise sniper rifle. Scavs are meticulous like that.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.m2038_bloody_maria:
§6ICONIC
§7As mean throughout all Night City as it is on the streets of Santo.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.m2038_the_headsman:
§6ICONIC
§7The go-to choice for when you've lost track of your enemies.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.mantis_blade:
§7Slice and dice your enemies with swift, deadly slashs.
§2 1.6 Attack Speed
tooltip.cyber_armorer.overture_archangel:
§6ICONIC
§7A piece of art that should never waste away in a display case.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.overture_crash:
§6ICONIC
§7A weapon for someone who won't miss the first time.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.overture_reliable:
§6ICONIC
§7Can't count on anyone? Count on this baby.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.saratoga_fenrir:
§6ICONIC
§7Belches fire like a dragon with a heartburn.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.saratoga_problem_s:
§6ICONIC
§7Dont bother aiming. Something's guaranteed to hit.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.unity: §7It's midtier, but there's nothing really to complain about.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.yukimura: §7Aiming takes time you might not have.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.yukimura_genjiroh:
§6ICONIC
§7A top-shelf pistol found only in the hands of the world's elite.
tooltip.cyber_armorer.yukimura_skippy:
§6ICONIC
§7A smartgun with a unique voice-over interface.
